message:
perf: add #[inline] to DetRng hot-path PRNG methods

next_u64() and next_usize() are called on every scheduler dispatch
for tie-breaking randomization. Inlining the xorshift64 body (3 XOR
ops) eliminates function-call overhead on the task dispatch hot path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
